reviews.review_description: Difficult to get into. I sent the contact email to get the login..nada.

reviews.review_title: How to set up sign on?
reviews.review_description: Hi… using this on Meta Quest 3. When I  start the app it asks for logon info, but there isn’t a link for setting up a new user. How do I use this? Couldn’t find any support options either in the app or online. Hopefully someone can help me?
